title: Refund Policy
text: Customers can request a refund within 30 days of purchase with proof of payment. Refunds after 30 days are not guaranteed.

title: Shipping Times
text: Standard shipping takes 5 to 7 business days. Express shipping takes 1 to 2 business days.

title: Account Deletion
text: To delete an account, users must go to Settings, select Privacy, and click Delete Account. Deletion is permanent after 14 days.
